calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Atty. Ross Madden, 415-567-1212, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party Nina Chong Trustee. No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's Motion To Release Property From Mechanic's Lien is GRANTED, moving party sustained its burden under CC 8488. No opposition filed. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NINA CHONG'S Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on the same date and time. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
